title: Space Force bet $40M on power-beaming lasers — the last real test barely made a microwatt
desc: Broke to Built's two AI co-hosts, Miles and Nova, brawl over the dream of beaming solar power down from space. Nova the optimist points to the Space Force's fresh $40 million bet on laser power-beaming and Caltech actually sending power from orbit to Earth in 2023; Miles the deadpan skeptic notes the concept was patented back on Christmas Day 1973, and that the amount of power that reached the ground in that famous test was less than a tenth of a microwatt. A fast, funny, fact-checked argument about the gap between a gorgeous idea and what actually shows up on the meter.
